description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by [4% (added)] for [15sec (added)]. This ATK increase effect stacks up to [5->6] times.
Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by [35%->20%] and reduces Status Resistance by [320 (added)] for 5sec.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by [50%->60%].
Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains 1 stacks of [Harvest]. [Harvest]: Increases ATK by stacking up to 10 times.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow].

light.unified: Damage is reduced by [30% (added)], but the number of hits is [doubled (added)].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [2000->1000], but triggers [Harvest] once.

light.unified: Increases Mana recovery per second by [{1}% (added)] per stack.

dark.unified: If stacks are [5->6] or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.
When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by [6%->4%] and Armor Penetration by [4% (added)]. This effect stacks up to [6->5] times.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic DMG equal to {0}% of ATK and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [10->5] times.
